name: Capability Answer
description: Answers whether Hermes can perform a requested action from the live tool registry and worker status.
triggerExamples: Can you build a page and deploy it?
Can you open a PR for this?
What can you actually do right now?
whenToUse: Use when the user asks whether Hermes can perform a task or whether a capability is connected.
whenNotToUse: Do not use to execute the requested task; answer capability status only.

outputContract.format: One honest capability status with the reason and any approval or worker limitation.
mustInclude: worker or approval limitation when relevant
mustAvoid: claiming a task is executing when only queuing is available

evaluationPrompts.input: Can you build a page and deploy it?
